title: Combining Favorite Techniques
excerpt: I love combining my favorite techniques at any given moment to make a layout. Currently I am digging stamping, torn washi tape and hand-stitching. You can see how this layout came together on Shimelle's blog . For the photo of…
body: I love combining my favorite techniques at any given moment to make a layout. Currently I am digging stamping, torn washi tape and hand-stitching. You can see how this layout came together on Shimelle's blog. For the photo of Jack smiling, I used my Instax printer, which I still love.
